summary: Completed testing of new roads and highways overlay system features. All 11 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests verified Traffic Flow and Route Reasoning toggle buttons, map controls, and route calculation functionality.

minor.issue: Returns 200 with error in body instead of 400 when bbox is missing - minor inconsistency but functional

issues: CORS error on nominatim.openstreetmap.org reverse geocoding - weather fetch fails but app continues to function (known issue from previous iteration)

action_items: Consider rotating Gemini API key as it's reported as leaked (non-blocking - voice guidance falls back to native TTS)
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Traffic Flow button (data-testid='traffic-flow-btn') is visible and functional in expanded map controls
VERIFIED: Route Reasoning button (data-testid='route-reasoning-btn') is visible and functional
VERIFIED: Both buttons show gold highlight (#D4AF37) with pulse animation when active
VERIFIED: Hamburger toggle (data-testid='map-controls-toggle') collapses/expands controls panel correctly
VERIFIED: POST /api/traffic-flow endpoint returns traffic flow data with results array containing jamFactor, speed, freeFlow data
VERIFIED: Route calculation works - entering destination and clicking suggestion calculates truck route with 3 alternatives
VERIFIED: Route comparison panel shows PRIMARY, ALT 1, ALT 2 with time, distance, and fuel cost estimates
VERIFIED: Highway shields are placed on route (15 shields placed for Omaha-Denver route)
VERIFIED: All existing map controls work (zoom in/out, overview, follow user, orientation, compass mode, 2D/3D toggle)

test_credentials.guest: Click 'Continue as Guest' button on login screen

context_for_next_testing_agent: Traffic Flow and Route Reasoning overlay features are fully implemented and working. Traffic Flow button fetches real-time data from HERE Traffic API v7 and renders green/gold/red polylines based on jamFactor at zoom level 10+. Route Reasoning parses toll, restriction, and highway spans from HERE routing API response. Map controls panel starts EXPANDED by default. Preview URL: https://hud-customizer-5.preview.emergentagent.com

guest_login.details: Continue as Guest button works, navigates to Dashboard

navigation_view.details: Navigation view loads with satellite map, search bar, ROUTE button, weather widget

traffic_flow_button.details: data-testid='traffic-flow-btn' visible when controls expanded, shows gold highlight when active

route_reasoning_button.details: data-testid='route-reasoning-btn' visible when controls expanded, shows gold highlight when active

map_controls_toggle.details: Hamburger button collapses/expands controls panel correctly

traffic_flow_api.details: POST /api/traffic-flow with bbox returns traffic flow data with results array

route_calculation.details: Entering destination and clicking ROUTE calculates truck route with 3 alternatives

route_comparison.details: Route comparison panel shows PRIMARY, ALT 1, ALT 2 with time, distance, fuel cost

zoom_controls.details: Zoom in/out buttons and zoom level indicator visible and functional

other_map_controls.details: Overview, follow user, orientation, compass mode, 2D/3D toggle all visible and functional

mocked_apis.none: No mocked APIs - all integrations are live (HERE Maps Traffic API v7, HERE Routing API v8)

known_issues.gemini_api_key: Gemini API key reported as leaked - voice guidance falls back to native TTS. Non-blocking issue.
known_issues.cors_nominatim: CORS error on nominatim.openstreetmap.org reverse geocoding - weather fetch fails but app continues to function
